title: Vitamin Solution for ESAW Media for Marine Phytoplankton
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"arl2a","text":"Stock vitamin solution for ESAW Media for Marine Phytoplankton","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"italic","offset":5,"length":17}],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Thiamine undetermined Amounts are per mL. Prepare stock volume according to individual need, bring to final desired volume with MilliQ H 2 O.
Vitamin B 12 undetermined Amounts are per mL. Prepare stock volume according to individual need.
Biotin undetermined Amounts are per mL. Prepare stock volume according to individual need.
After mixing, filter sterilize with 0.2 μm filter and store in dark at -20ºC. Divide into small aliquots if desired.
creator: Ashley A Humphrey
